decision_commentary: Completeness scored 3: all five required fields are present (source_channel, category, received_at, summary, status) but the raw message from the client is summarized in the summary field rather than stored verbatim — rubric requires score 3 for this condition. Accuracy scored 5: source_channel='instagram' matches the inbound platform exactly; category='project_inquiry' is correctly classified for a residential design lead. Clarity scored 5: summary is immediately scannable — client name (Carlos Mendoza), project type (250sqm modern residence), location (Los Cabos), key features (pool, rooftop terrace), and budget range ($300K–$500K USD) all visible in one sentence. State_sync scored 3: simulated run — fields documented but no live Asana task created. Timing scored 5: received_at and record creation are in the same pipeline session. Decision_readiness scored 5: all required fields populated, quality signal clear, Marcela can make approve/reject decision immediately.
celia_routing_notes: No Celia routing at Segment A — Marcela is direct reviewer.
